body_txt: Brief descriptions, simple structure, short sentences, fragments where understood, plain words, few figures of speech. Often telegraphic, lacking aspects of Standard English such as "the" or "and" where the alternative still makes sense. Beige writers pen "headlinese", nix needless details . Typically found in instruction manuals. Important information conveyed clearly and quickly, no need for excess. Effective if it works for a character, bad if it doesn't. Use carefully. Otherwise, is impersonal, overly terse. Children's Literature is often written like this, if only because the vocabulary and content will typically be restricted to match the intended readership. Compare Minimalism , Fun with Acronyms , Brevity Is Wit , Laconic Wiki , Understatement , IKEA Erotica . May be Boring, but Practical . Contrast Wall of Text , Purple Prose . Common in Private Eye Monologue or from a Terse Talker . Spock Speak is known for it.
